metadata.description: Standardized formatting, date conventions, and structure enforcement (updated length guidance)

date_formatting.enforcement: Hard conversion - all dates must be transformed

ongoing_dates.representation: Use 'Present' or 'To date' for current positions

reverse_chronological_order.requirement: ALL dated sections must be strictly reverse-chronological (newest first)

validation.check: Compare end dates of consecutive entries; flag if not in descending order

length_constraints.preferred_length: 2 pages (up to 3 pages for senior/complex histories)
length_constraints.enforcement: Hard limit - content beyond 3 pages will be rejected

strategy_for_excess.step_1: Consolidate entries older than 10 years into single 'Previous Experience' line
strategy_for_excess.step_2: Reduce descriptions to essential duties only
strategy_for_excess.step_3: Remove redundant skills (consolidate into single mention)
strategy_for_excess.step_4: Archive older education/certifications or list without description

priority_preservation: 1. Most recent 7 years of work experience

consolidated: 2006 - 2012: Previous roles in technical support and junior development

work_experience_template.duties: 2-4 concise duty statements using action verbs

typography_standards.font_family: Professional sans-serif recommended (Arial, Calibri, Helvetica, Verdana)

text_emphasis.bold: Section headers and job titles only
text_emphasis.underline: Avoid if possible; use bold instead

check_1.name: Date Format Consistency
check_1.rule: All dates must match primary or alternative European format

check_2.name: Reverse Chronological Order
check_2.rule: Each section must be ordered newest to oldest

check_3.name: Length Compliance
check_3.rule: Content must not exceed 3 pages (2 pages preferred; allow 3 for senior/complex histories)
check_3.escalation: Request consolidation if >3 pages; suggest keeping most-recent work detailed and grouping older roles

check_4.name: File Format Validation
check_4.rule: Must be PDF or accepted document format

brevity_and_lean_style.objective: Keep CV lean, direct, and time-efficient for reviewers
rules: Use one result per bullet, lead with the metric where possible
Avoid filler and stacked adjectives; prefer numbers over adjectives
Combine repetitive responsibilities; remove low-impact tasks
If content exceeds 3 pages, consolidate roles >10 years old into 'Previous Experience'

senior_role_requirements.first_line: Include a Scope line before bullets (users/clients, transactions, modules, criticality)
senior_role_requirements.bullets_format: Label bullets as Strategic Achievements; prioritize impact over activity

examples.scope_line: Scope: Enterprise HRIS/Payroll platform serving 500+ clients; 200K+ end-users; $2.5B+ annual transactions
examples.metric_first_bullet: Reduced defect escape rate from 8% to 2% by architecting regression strategy (400+ cases)
